zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强上行
zh.content:
短线呈震荡上行结构，价格稳居0.16上方运行，低点逐步抬升显示买盘承接增强，但整体突破力度仍偏温和，需持续观察0.1625压力有效性。

MACD指标维持正值并有扩张迹象，说明多头动能仍在延续；价格运行于SMA20之上形成良好均线支撑结构，趋势偏多，但缺少RSI参考使超买强度判断略有不足。

下方支撑重点关注0.1597日内低点与0.156均线区域，一旦失守可能回归震荡中枢；上方阻力集中在0.1625附近，若放量突破则有望进一步试探0.165区间。

操作策略建议以回踩低吸为主，依托均线支撑分批布局多单更为稳健；若价格冲高受阻出现滞涨信号，可逐步止盈并等待下一轮结构性回调机会。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ADA/USD is maintaining a short-term recovery structure after holding above recent intraday lows near 0.1597. Price action is currently consolidating just under the 0.1625 high, suggesting a mild bullish bias. The pair is trading above its 20-period SMA at 0.1560, indicating improving momentum and a potential shift from neutral to early uptrend conditions, though follow-through strength remains limited without a breakout above local resistance.

MACD readings at 0.0023 indicate positive momentum, implying buyers currently dominate short-term flow. Although a signal line is not provided, the positive histogram suggests bullish momentum is intact but not accelerating strongly. With RSI unavailable, momentum confirmation is incomplete, so traders should rely more on price structure and moving averages. Overall, momentum leans bullish but remains fragile without stronger confirmation from oscillators.

Pivotal resistance is seen at 0.1625, where recent highs are forming a near-term ceiling. A decisive break above this level could open the path toward 0.165 and then 0.170 as next upside targets. On the downside, immediate support lies at 0.1597, followed by stronger structural support at the 20-SMA around 0.1560. A break below this zone may expose 0.1500 as a deeper retracement area.

Short-term traders may consider buying dips near 0.1597–0.1560 while the price remains above the 20-SMA, as the structure still favors a gradual uptrend. However, risk management is essential due to weak momentum confirmation. Conservative traders may wait for a breakout above 0.1625 with volume support before entering long positions targeting 0.165–0.170. Failure to hold 0.156 would invalidate bullish bias.
